message:
feat(abi): add OnceLock-cached TLS key symbol resolution with GLIBC_2.34 priority

Add OnceLock-based caching for pthread_key_create, pthread_key_delete,
pthread_getspecific, and pthread_setspecific host symbol pointers. Add
resolve_host_symbol_nocache() with GLIBC_2.34-first lookup order
(modern glibc merged pthread into libc at 2.34) followed by 2.2.5
and 2.3.2 fallbacks, plus unversioned RTLD_NEXT last resort. Wire
OnceLock resolvers into the interposed TLS key functions so the host
symbol is resolved once and cached via OnceLock instead of going
through the Mutex-based HOST_SYMBOL_CACHE on every call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
